description: To support detailed tax reporting, taxes must be mapped at the item level. 1. Tax Base Consistency: - Logic: SUM(invoice_items.subtotal) - SUM(invoice_items.discount) must equal invoices.subtotal. 2. Prorated Tax Calculation (for Partial Payments): - Algorithm: When a partial payment is registered in payment_allocations, calculate the
: - Factor=AmountAllocated/InvoiceTotal - Action: Use this Factor to determine the portion of IVA and ISR considered
